embed.title: !info
embed.description: Look up pokemon, items, and current game data — no tracking required.

fields.name: Pokemon details
fields.value: `{{prefix}}info <pokemon>` — by name or dex id. Returns types, base stats, generation, evolution chain, available forms, weather boost, and 100% IV CP at level 40.

fields.name: Game data
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}info moves` — list of moves with IDs
`{{prefix}}info items` — list of items (berries, evolution stones, etc.) with IDs
`{{prefix}}info weather` — current weather and boosted types
`{{prefix}}info templates` — DTS template numbers loaded on this server (which `template:N` values your tracking rules can use)

fields.name: Statistics
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}info rarity` — pokemon rarity tier breakdown (common → ultra-rare) and which species are in each tier
`{{prefix}}info shiny` — observed shiny rates per species (sample-based, server-specific)

fields.name: Related
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}tracked` — see your active tracking rules
`{{prefix}}help track` — learn how to use the info above to build rules
